narration: Science has a clearer story about publication bias than social media does.

narration: Publication bias occurs when studies with positive results are more likely to be published, skewing our understanding.
visual_description: Context visual: Publication bias occurs when studies with positive results are more likely to be published, skewing our understanding.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Publication bias occurs when studies with positive results are more likely to be published, skewing our understanding.

narration: Imagine relying on incomplete data to make health decisions. Frightening, right?

narration: Studies show that more than 50% of negative results never see the light of day.
